RT by @RTErdogan: Beştepe Gündemi:

Cumhurbaşkanımız Sayın Recep Tayyip Erdoğan'ın son bir haftada gerçekleştirdiği önemli program ve temaslardan öne çıkan başlıklar.

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text:
Our support for Ukraine is ironclad. 
 
We will stand with Ukraine for as long as it takes. Ukraine’s security is Europe’s security.

Slava Ukraini.

social.text: La fe, cuando se hace oración y acción, abre caminos hacia las transformaciones necesarias. Permanezcamos en comunión con Dios, en la verdad y en la paz. 🙏🏾

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu met today with a delegation of senior US administration legal advisers and discussed with them the lawfare threat against Israel, the US and other democratic countries that are fighting global terrorism.

social.name: Nayib Bukele
social.text:
Nigeria’s economy is 6–8 times larger than El Salvador’s.

Even its GDP is eight times bigger than theirs. 

Nigeria is richer than El Salvador, and yet it cannot even boast of having a world-class hospital like this.
